title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself does not pose a direct threat, but its adoption could lead to potential misuse by attackers to identify and exploit vulnerabilities in unpatched systems. Additionally, if the tool has undisclosed security flaws, it could introduce risks to users who rely on it.
recommended_actions: Evaluate the tool's source code and security practices before integrating it into workflows.
Ensure that dependencies are regularly updated and patched, regardless of the tool's recommendations.
Monitor for any reports of vulnerabilities or misuse associated with the tool.

title: FFmpeg versions 4.4 through 8.1.2 contain an out-of-bounds memory access vulnerability in the ADX...
description: FFmpeg versions 4.4 through 8.1.2 contain an out-of-bounds memory access vulnerability in the ADX audio decoder within libavcodec/adxdec.c that allows attackers to trigger both out-of-bounds reads and writes by supplying a crafted ADX or AAX audio file with a mid-stream channel layout change. When AV_PKT_DATA_NEW_EXTRADATA side data is received mid-stream, the adx_decode_frame function re-parses the stream header but fails to update the internal channel state, causing subsequent decoding operati

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in FFmpeg's ADX audio decoder allows attackers to exploit out-of-bounds memory access by supplying a crafted audio file. This could lead to application crashes, data corruption, or potential remote code execution, depending on the context in which FFmpeg is used.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to a patched version of FFmpeg as soon as it becomes available or apply any official patches addressing CVE-2026-64835.
Implement file validation and sanitization mechanisms to detect and reject malformed ADX or AAX files before processing.
Monitor systems using FFmpeg for unusual behavior and review logs for signs of exploitation attempts.

title: FFmpeg versions 0.6.3 through 8.1.2 contain an infinite loop vulnerability in the RTP/ASF demuxer...
description: FFmpeg versions 0.6.3 through 8.1.2 contain an infinite loop vulnerability in the RTP/ASF demuxer within libavformat/rtpdec_asf.c that allows remote attackers to cause denial of service by sending a crafted RTP/ASF stream. The rtp_asf_fix_header function fails to validate a minimum chunksize when iterating over ASF objects, causing the loop pointer to never advance when a chunksize is smaller than the 24-byte minimum ASF object header size, resulting in CPU exhaustion that denies service to legi

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-64834.

title: FFmpeg versions 0.7.1 through 8.1.2 contain an out-of-bounds read vulnerability in the S/PDIF...
description: FFmpeg versions 0.7.1 through 8.1.2 contain an out-of-bounds read vulnerability in the S/PDIF muxer that allows attackers to access memory beyond buffer boundaries by supplying a crafted DTS stream with a core_size value larger than the actual packet length. Attackers can exploit the missing bounds check in the spdif_header_dts4 function by providing a malicious DTS-HD audio stream during S/PDIF re-muxing to trigger unauthorized memory reads beyond the packet buffer.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-64833.

title: FFmpeg versions 4.4 through 8.1.2 contain a double-free vulnerability in the NVIDIA NVDEC...
description: FFmpeg versions 4.4 through 8.1.2 contain a double-free vulnerability in the NVIDIA NVDEC hardware decoder within libavcodec/nvdec.c that allows attackers to trigger memory corruption by supplying a crafted video file. When no decoder surfaces remain, the ff_nvdec_start_frame_sep_ref error path frees memory via nvdec_fdd_priv_free while the calling layer subsequently frees the same frame description data, resulting in a double-free of the underlying decoder context in any FFmpeg-based applicatio

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The double-free vulnerability in FFmpeg's NVIDIA NVDEC hardware decoder can lead to memory corruption, potentially allowing attackers to execute arbitrary code, crash applications, or perform denial-of-service (DoS) attacks. This poses a significant risk to any application utilizing affected FFmpeg versions for video processing.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to a patched version of FFmpeg as soon as an update addressing CVE-2026-64832 becomes available.
Implement input validation and sanitization to detect and reject crafted video files that could exploit the vulnerability.
Monitor systems for unusual activity or crashes in applications using FFmpeg and consider isolating vulnerable systems until patched.

title: Elgg before 7.0.0 does not check image dimensions to prevent denial of service via a large avatar...
description: Elgg before 7.0.0 does not check image dimensions to prevent denial of service via a large avatar upload.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to upload excessively large avatar images, potentially causing a denial of service (DoS) by consuming server resources. This could lead to degraded performance or unavailability of the application.
affected_industries: Small to Medium Enterprises using Elgg
recommended_actions: Upgrade to Elgg version 7.0.0 or later to address the vulnerability.
Implement server-side validation to restrict image dimensions and file sizes during uploads.
Monitor server resource usage and set rate limits to mitigate potential DoS attacks.

title: Duplicati v2.3.0.1 backup software gives Authenticated Users MODIFY permissions that propagate to...
description: Duplicati v2.3.0.1 backup software gives Authenticated Users MODIFY permissions that propagate to all subdirectories. Installing the software outside of the Program Files directory, or on a custom path, creates a LocalSystem service running from a directory that any standard local user can write to. A standard local user can overwrite any DLL in the service directory. On service restart, the OS loads the attacker's DLL before any managed code runs, executing arbitrary code as SYSTEM.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-16157.

title: Onlook through 0.2.32, fixed in commit 423e2e9, contains a broken object level authorization...
description: Onlook through 0.2.32, fixed in commit 423e2e9, contains a broken object level authorization vulnerability that allows authenticated attackers to access and manipulate other users' resources by supplying arbitrary UUID values to tRPC API procedures including project.get, member.remove, and chat.conversation.delete. Attackers can provide arbitrary projectId or conversationId values without authorization validation to read, modify, and delete other users' project data, members, and conversation hi

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-65013.

title: FFmpeg versions 2.1 through 8.1.2 contains a heap buffer overflow vulnerability in the VobSub...
description: FFmpeg versions 2.1 through 8.1.2 contains a heap buffer overflow vulnerability in the VobSub subtitle demuxer that allows attackers to corrupt adjacent heap memory by supplying a malicious .sub/.idx subtitle file declaring more distinct stream IDs than the fixed-size array bounds in libavformat/mpeg.c. Attackers can craft a subtitle file with excessive distinct stream IDs to trigger unbounded writes beyond the vobsub->q[] array boundary via ff_subtitles_queue_insert(), potentially achieving arb

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-64830.

title: InvokeAI before 6.13.7 contains an unauthenticated directory enumeration vulnerability in the GET...
description: InvokeAI before 6.13.7 contains an unauthenticated directory enumeration vulnerability in the GET /api/v2/models/scan_folder endpoint that accepts attacker-controlled scan_path parameters. Unauthenticated attackers can recursively enumerate arbitrary server filesystem directories and use HTTP response codes to determine file existence and readability, bypassing multi-user mode access controls.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to enumerate and potentially access sensitive directory structures on the server, which could lead to data leakage, reconnaissance for further attacks, and bypassing of access controls in multi-user environments.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to InvokeAI version 6.13.7 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Implement strict input validation and sanitization for the 'scan_path' parameter to prevent directory traversal attacks.
Enable server-side logging and monitoring to detect and respond to unauthorized access attempts.

title: Graylog2 Server before commit 46a2eeb contains a missing per-entity permission check in the POST ...
description: Graylog2 Server before commit 46a2eeb contains a missing per-entity permission check in the POST /events/definitions/{definitionId}/duplicate endpoint that allows authenticated users to clone any event definition. Attackers with the low-privilege eventdefinitions:create capability can read private event definitions including detection queries, aggregation thresholds, grouping fields, schedules, and notification bindings by duplicating them.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-65011.

title: FFmpeg versions 8.0 through 8.1.2 contains a stack buffer overflow vulnerability in the Vulkan...
description: FFmpeg versions 8.0 through 8.1.2 contains a stack buffer overflow vulnerability in the Vulkan HEVC hardware decoder that allows remote attackers to overwrite return addresses and adjacent stack frames by supplying a crafted HEVC/H.265 bitstream. Attackers can embed a malicious vps_num_hrd_parameters value exceeding HEVC_MAX_SUB_LAYERS in any supported container format to overflow stack-allocated arrays in the vk_hevc_end_frame function, potentially achieving arbitrary code execution.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-64831.

title: Froiden TableTrack through 1.3.10 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability that...
description: Froiden TableTrack through 1.3.10 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to inject arbitrary HTML and JavaScript through the order notes field without sanitization. Attackers can craft malicious payloads in customer order placement that execute in the admin's browser session when viewing order details, enabling session token theft or unauthorized administrative actions.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in Froiden TableTrack through 1.3.10 allows attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript in the admin's browser session. This can lead to session token theft, unauthorized administrative actions, and potential compromise of sensitive data.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply input sanitization and output encoding for the order notes field to prevent malicious payloads.
Update to a patched version of Froiden TableTrack if available, or contact the vendor for a security update.
Implement Content Security Policy (CSP) headers to mitigate the impact of XSS attacks.

title: A flaw was found in librest. The PKCE implementation for OAuth authorization uses the GRand...
description: A flaw was found in librest. The PKCE implementation for OAuth authorization uses the GRand function from the GLib API, a cryptographically insecure pseudo-random number generator. Because the generated "code verifier" lacks sufficient cryptographic entropy, a malicious actor can reverse-engineer the pseudo-random number generator (PRNG) seed to predict or reconstruct the code verifier string, allowing an attacker to bypass PKCE protections and successfully impersonate the client during the OAut

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-16615.

title: Dell PowerProtect Data Manager, versions prior to 20.2.0.0, contain(s) an Improper Input...
description: Dell PowerProtect Data Manager, versions prior to 20.2.0.0, contain(s) an Improper Input Validation vulnerability in the REST API. A high privileged attacker with remote access could potentially exploit this vulnerability, leading to Elevation of privileges.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Dell PowerProtect Data Manager allows a high-privileged attacker with remote access to exploit improper input validation in the REST API, potentially leading to elevation of privileges. This could result in unauthorized access, data breaches, or disruption of critical backup and recovery operations.
recommended_actions: Immediately update Dell PowerProtect Data Manager to version 20.2.0.0 or later to mitigate the vulnerability.
Restrict remote access to the affected systems and monitor for any unusual activity in the REST API logs.
Conduct a thorough security review of systems using Dell PowerProtect to ensure no unauthorized changes or access have occurred.

title: Dell PowerProtect Data Manager, versions prior to 20.2.0.0, contain(s) a Generation of Incorrect...
description: Dell PowerProtect Data Manager, versions prior to 20.2.0.0, contain(s) a Generation of Incorrect Security Tokens vulnerability in the IAM. A low privileged attacker with remote access could potentially exploit this vulnerability, leading to Elevation of privileges.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-49499.

title: Dell PowerProtect Data Manager, versions prior to 20.2.0.0, contain(s) an Improper Input...
description: Dell PowerProtect Data Manager, versions prior to 20.2.0.0, contain(s) an Improper Input Validation vulnerability in the REST API. A high privileged attacker with remote access could potentially exploit this vulnerability, leading to Remote execution.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Dell PowerProtect Data Manager's REST API could allow a high-privileged attacker with remote access to execute arbitrary code, potentially compromising sensitive data and system integrity.
recommended_actions: Upgrade Dell PowerProtect Data Manager to version 20.2.0.0 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Restrict remote access to the REST API by implementing network segmentation and firewall rules.
Monitor system logs for unusual activity and implement intrusion detection systems to identify potential exploitation attempts.

description: Dell PowerProtect Data Manager, versions prior to 20.2.0.0, contain(s) an Improper Input Validation vulnerability. A high privileged attacker with remote access could potentially exploit this vulnerability, leading to Elevation of privileges.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-40714.

title: Dell PowerProtect Data Manager, versions prior to 20.2.0.0, contain(s) an Exposure of Sensitive...
description: Dell PowerProtect Data Manager, versions prior to 20.2.0.0, contain(s) an Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability in the REST API. A high privileged attacker with local access could potentially exploit this vulnerability, leading to Information exposure.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-44276.

title: A vulnerability in Fujitsu Software Linux openFT and Fujitsu Software Oracle Solaris openFT...
description: A vulnerability in Fujitsu Software Linux openFT and Fujitsu Software Oracle Solaris openFT before version 12.1D00 allows for local privilege escalation to root of an already authenticated user on GNU/Linux or Oracle Solaris. The Fsas Technologies PSIRT obtained that intelligence internally and covers the CVE beyond its CNA scope under existing agreement with Fujitsu Germany.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated users to escalate privileges to root, potentially leading to full system compromise. This could result in data breaches, unauthorized system modifications, or disruption of critical services.
recommended_actions: Immediately update Fujitsu Software Linux openFT and Fujitsu Software Oracle Solaris openFT to version 12.1D00 or later to mitigate the vulnerability.
Conduct a thorough review of user accounts and permissions to ensure no unauthorized access has occurred.
Implement monitoring and detection mechanisms to identify any suspicious activity related to privilege escalation attempts.

title: Dell PowerProtect Data Manager, versions prior to 20.2.0.0, contain(s) an Improper Input...
description: Dell PowerProtect Data Manager, versions prior to 20.2.0.0, contain(s) an Improper Input Validation vulnerability in the REST API. A high privileged attacker with remote access could potentially exploit this vulnerability, leading to Elevation of privileges.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-40712.

title: CVE-2026-14251 - A flaw was found in the OpenShift GitOps operator. The ClusterRole reconciler does not validate reso
description: A flaw was found in the OpenShift GitOps operator. The ClusterRole reconciler does not validate resource ownership when reconciling ClusterRole objects. A namespace-scoped Argo CD instance can trigger deletion of a ClusterRole owned by a cluster-scoped Argo CD instance by crafting a name collision, resulting in a denial of service.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the OpenShift GitOps operator allows namespace-scoped Argo CD instances to delete ClusterRole objects owned by cluster-scoped Argo CD instances through name collisions. This can result in a denial of service, disrupting critical cluster-wide operations and potentially impacting application deployments.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patches or updates provided by the OpenShift GitOps operator maintainers to address the vulnerability.
Restrict permissions for namespace-scoped Argo CD instances to limit their ability to interact with cluster-scoped resources.
Monitor and audit ClusterRole changes in the environment to detect and respond to unauthorized modifications.

title: CVE-2026-42936 - The installer of HYPER SBI 2 insecurely loads Dynamic Link Libraries. If there is a crafted DLL at t
description: The installer of HYPER SBI 2 insecurely loads Dynamic Link Libraries. If there is a crafted DLL at the same directory when invoking the affected installer, arbitrary code may be executed with the privilege of the user invoking the installer.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-42936.

title: CVE-2026-12512 - The Quotes llama WordPress plugin before 3.1.6 does not properly sanitize and escape a user-supplied
description: The Quotes llama WordPress plugin before 3.1.6 does not properly sanitize and escape a user-supplied parameter before using it in a SQL query, allowing unauthenticated attackers to perform UNION-based SQL injection and read arbitrary data from the database, including password hashes.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-12512.

title: CVE-2026-12281 - The Shibboleth WordPress plugin before 2.5.4 does not fail closed when its HTTP header identity mode
description: The Shibboleth WordPress plugin before 2.5.4 does not fail closed when its HTTP header identity mode is enabled without an anti-spoofing key, treating any request that carries identity headers as an authenticated session without verifying them. On a deployment where untrusted client headers reach the application, an unauthenticated attacker can log in with forged identity headers and, when automatic account creation and the default administrator role mapping are enabled, create and sign in as a new administrator. Exploitation requires the non-default HTTP header attribute mode, an empty or absent spoof key, automatic account creation enabled, and a deployment that does not strip untrusted client headers before they reach the application.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-12281.

title: CVE-2026-11580 - The Kali Forms — Contact Form & Drag-and-Drop Builder WordPress plugin before 2.4.17 does not perfor
description: The Kali Forms — Contact Form & Drag-and-Drop Builder WordPress plugin before 2.4.17 does not perform a per-object capability check in its post-duplication AJAX action, allowing users with Contributor-level access or above to duplicate any post (regardless of owner, post type, or status) into a published post they own and read its private post metadata, including secrets stored by other Kali Forms — Contact Form & Drag-and-Drop Builder WordPress plugin before 2.4.17.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11580.

title: CVE-2026-11579 - The Kali Forms — Contact Form & Drag-and-Drop Builder WordPress plugin before 2.4.17 does not verify
description: The Kali Forms — Contact Form & Drag-and-Drop Builder WordPress plugin before 2.4.17 does not verify that a file upload is made against an existing form configured with a file-upload field, accepting uploads regardless of whether any such form exists, which allows unauthenticated users to upload files to the WordPress Media Library; the uploads are limited to WordPress's default-allowed MIME types, so this does not lead to code execution.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11579.

title: CVE-2026-8920 - Improper Restriction of Communication Channel to Intended Endpoints and External Control of File Nam
description:
Improper Restriction of Communication Channel to Intended Endpoints and External Control of File Name or Path in Aura Wallpaper Service allow a local user to perform file operations by sending crafted commands containing an arbitrary file path and bypassing the service’s path restrictions . On specific models , this can also cause a single feature to become unavailable .
Refer to the ' Security Update for Aura Wallpaper Service ' section on the ASUS Security Advisory for more information.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8920.

title: CVE-2026-8919 - Permissive Cross-domain Security Policy with Untrusted Domains in ASUS GameSDK allows a remote user
description:
Permissive Cross-domain Security Policy with Untrusted Domains in ASUS GameSDK allows a remote user to obtain a local user’s NTLM hash by convincing the user to visit a crafted web page that sends a request containing a UNC path to the application’s local service endpoint. This can result in information disclosure or data tampering, may cause GameSDK to become unavailable, and may also enable access to the victim’s information on other services.
Refer to the ' Security Update for ASUS GameSDK  ' section on the ASUS Security Advisory for more information.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8919.

title: CVE-2026-15030 - Out-of-bounds Read in ASUS System Control Interface v3, ASUS System Control Interface, and ASUS Busi
description:
Out-of-bounds Read in ASUS System Control Interface v3, ASUS System Control Interface, and ASUS Business Manager allows a local administrator to read memory regions beyond the intended firmware boundary by supplying a crafted IOCTL request that bypasses the validation.
Refer to the ' Security Update for ASUS System Control Interface  ' section on the ASUS Security Advisory for more information.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-15030.

title: CVE-2026-15029 - Untrusted Pointer Dereference in ASUS System Control Interface v3, ASUS System Control Interface, an
description:
Untrusted Pointer Dereference in ASUS System Control Interface v3, ASUS System Control Interface, and ASUS Business Manager allows a local administrator to perform arbitrary physical memory read and write operations via crafted IOCTL requests to the driver, bypassing OS-enforced memory protections.
Refer to the ' 
Security Update for ASUS System Control Interface  ' section on the ASUS Security Advisory for more information.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-15029.

title: CVE-2026-13585 - Allocation of Resources Without Limits and Throttling and Sensitive Information in Resource Not Remo
description:
Allocation of Resources Without Limits and Throttling and Sensitive Information in Resource Not Removed Before Reuse in the ASUS System Control Interface driver and ASUS Business Manager allow a local administrator to disclose sensitive information via crafted IOCTL requests, which, in severe cases, may lead to a Denial of Service (DoS) on the system.
Refer to the ' 
Security Update for ASUS System Control Interface  ' section on the ASUS Security Advisory for more information.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-13585.

title: CVE-2026-13385 - An Improper Validation of Integrity Check Value and Improper Certificate Validation in certain ASUS
description:
An Improper Validation of Integrity Check Value and Improper Certificate Validation in certain ASUS router models allows a remote man-in-the-middle(MITM) user to make the router download and execute arbitrary command via a spoofed server.
Refer to the ' 
Security Update for ASUS Router Firmware  ' section on the ASUS Security Advisory for more information.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-13385.

title: CVE-2026-11851 - Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ("SQL Injection") in the web mana
description:
Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ("SQL Injection") in the web management interface of certain ASUS router models allows a remote authenticated user to disclose confidential information via a crafted request that bypasses existing input validation
Refer to the ' 
Security Update for ASUS Router Firmware ' section on the ASUS Security Advisory for more information.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11851.

title: CVE-2026-9770 - Kasa EC71 v4 and EC70 v4 firmware contains a static cryptographic private key stored in a read-only
description:
Kasa EC71 v4 and EC70 v4 firmware contains a static cryptographic private key stored in a read-only filesystem
that is shared across devices.  An
attacker with access to the firmware image can extract the embedded key.  









Successful
exploitation may allow an unauthenticated attacker on the same network to use
this key in the web management service, compromising the confidentiality of
encrypted communications. This may enable passive decryption of traffic or
active man-in-the-middle (MITM) attacks

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-9770.

title: CVE-2026-13230 - An information disclosure vulnerability was identified in TP-Link Kasa EC70 v4 and EC71 v4 in the lo
description:
An information disclosure vulnerability was identified in TP-Link Kasa EC70 v4 and EC71 v4 in the local discovery mechanism, which exposes
sensitive geolocation information without requiring authentication. This issue
allows an attacker on the same local network to retrieve geolocation-related
data through crafted responses.

The
vulnerability impacts confidentiality only, with no evidence of integrity of
availability impact.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-13230.
